name: Ninfa's Green Sauce (Fndt36a)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chopped green tomatoes, tomatillos, jalapeno peppers, and garlic in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 15 minutes or until the tomatoes are soft.
4. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
5. Peel, seed, and slice the avocados; set aside.
6. In a food processor, combine part of the green tomato mixture with part of the avocados, cilantro, and salt. Process until smooth and transfer to a large bowl.
7. Repeat with remaining green tomato mixture and avocado.
8. Add to the bowl and stir in the sour cream.
9. Cover with plastic wrap and chill.
10. Makes 5-6 cups.
Note: Real sour cream can be used instead of imitation.
